visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair pulled back stands in a bright, modern kitchen, speaking directly to the camera with high facial arousal. She holds up a tube of green wasabi, followed by a yellow jar of Vegemite and a bag of red chilies against the kitchen backdrop. (2) The scene shifts to a top-down close-up view of black-gloved hands meticulously preparing salmon sushi on white cutting boards. The hands spread a dark brown paste and place small pieces of vibrant red chili onto the raw fish slices. (3) A young man wearing a blue and white varsity-style vest joins the woman behind the counter. They stand behind two trays of sushi, gesturing and looking at the camera. The man appears confident, adjusting his hair, while the woman maintains a slightly nervous smile. (4) The man picks up a piece of sushi and eats it. He immediately reacts with exaggerated body movements, jumping, spinning, and shouting, while the woman and another female guest in a white dress laugh and point. (5) A montage follows showing different individuals tasting the sushi. They exhibit varied expressions of shock, disgust, and confusion. The video concludes with a celebratory graphic overlay featuring energetic characters and text promoting an upcoming running event.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 今天有個大前輩來. [Logo]: @HanHan. (2) [Subtitle]: 我準備跟他拍一支短影片. (3) [Subtitle]: 但我給他的reference裡面是寫加哇沙米!. (4) [Variety]: 其實裡面真正加的是這兩樣. [Slogan]: 維吉麥 Vegemite + 生辣椒. (5) [Subtitle]: 鋪上生辣椒. (6) [Variety]: 快轉中... (7) [Variety]: (看起來很緊張). [Subtitle]: 組裝完成. (8) [Slogan]: 8/8 HAHABABY 路跑開始報名囉!!!!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male senior guest (Ga Ge), 1 female guest (Er Bo), 1 male guest (Cai Zong Han).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair tied back in a bun, wearing a white long-sleeved mesh top and later a pink patterned button-down shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern kitchen with white cabinetry, a refrigerator, a stovetop, and various kitchen utensils visible on the counter and walls.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-tempo, bright synthesized pop track and a clear female voice delivering high-energy Chinese narration. Sharp 'whoosh' sound effects are synchronized with fast visual cuts during the introduction of the prank. (2) As the sushi preparation begins, the music shifts to a rhythmic, percussive bed. Distinct tactile clicks and soft plastic rustling from gloves are audible, integrated with the continuous energetic vocal delivery. (3) A sudden, high-pitched male exclamation marks a new phase, accompanied by a comedic 'boing' sound effect and an exaggerated slide whistle. The background chatter of multiple people laughing and cheering becomes the dominant acoustic layer. (4) A melodic promotional jingle with a strong four-on-the-floor beat takes over the soundtrack. Overlapping vocal cheers and applause tracks punctuate the high-arousal excitement of the event announcement, maintaining a high spectral brightness throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Preparation -> Prank Execution -> Reaction -> Outro/Promotion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by documenting a food-based prank involving unusual and strong-tasting ingredients (Vegemite and chili), specifically targeting a well-known senior guest to elicit a dramatic and humorous reaction.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: A dedicated segment at the end of the video explicitly promotes the 'HAHABABY 路跑' event with branding and registration info.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media editing tropes like high-density SFX and on-screen variety captions to maximize comedic impact.
